image_prompt: SVG: grouped bar chart, Yield strength / MPa (y, 0-700, ticks every 100, no gridlines) vs Alloy type (x, 1-5), two bars per alloy (Pure Al teal, Al–V alloy orange) with legend; alloy bar always higher, yield strength rising across alloys 1-5.

topic: NiMH battery charge vs storage temperature
image_prompt: SVG: scatter graph, Percentage charge / % (y, 0-100, ticks every 20) vs Temperature / °C (x, ticks at 0,15,30,45,60,80), no gridlines; 6 points (0,99),(15,97),(30,92),(45,82),(60,65),(75,35) showing charge falling as temperature rises (≈85% at 40°C; ≈10% extrapolated at 90°C).

render_data.title: NiMH battery: charge remaining vs storage temperature
render_data.task: Drag the crosshair to read off the percentage charge at 40 °C (valid) and 90 °C (extrapolated).

image_prompt: SVG: two smooth line panels vs Year (1970-2010), no gridlines. Left: Energy used in Al production / % (0-100) falling from 100 in 1975 to ~55 by 2005 with a small plateau near 1985-1990 (teal). Right: Aluminium recycling rate / % (0-60) rising from ~15 in 1978 to ~50 by 2005 (orange).
